product: Explore table data using an LLM (Beta)
tagline: You can now ask natural language questions about the sample data using Catalog Explorer.
what_it_does: You can now ask natural language questions about the sample data using Catalog Explorer. The Assistant generates the SQL based on metadata context and table usage patterns. After the query is generated, you can validate the query and then run it against the underlying table.
why_it_matters: You can navigate Unity Catalog governed database objects in Catalog Explorer without active compute.
key_takeaway: You can now ask natural language questions about the sample data using Catalog Explorer.
